# Keep Your House in Bankruptcy - Homestead Exemption Guide [2026] - Keep My House
> Can you keep your house in bankruptcy? Homestead exemptions, Chapter 13 mortgage catch-up, and lien stripping explained. Free 2026 state-b...

## About
keepmyhouseinbankruptcy.com is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
